sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n100254" key="sunepiqwu/+ssw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνεπι-θωΰσσω</orth>, <sense id="n100254.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">halloo so as to cheer on together</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.757d</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
